title: Argparse Interface, Help, Options, and Usage Errors · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss decisions for argparse interface, help, options, and usage errors and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, explicit limitations, and named browser, filesystem, terminal, packaging, operating-system, load, security, and release transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for testable user-facing command interface. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Define positional input and explicit encoding, token, ranking, format, width, and limit options from user tasks.
Reject invalid ranges, conflicting flags, unsupported choices, and missing values at the parser boundary with usage evidence.
Write task-oriented usage, descriptions, metavariables, defaults, units, examples, exit behavior, and accessibility notes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

Build deterministic Python evidence to define and validate a reproducible task-oriented argparse interface with useful help; retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity; then replace an ASCII word with a canonically equivalent combining sequence and compare the declared counts. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Run the Python314 Argparse boundary case for testable user-facing command interface, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

Accept the Python314 Argparse result because visible testable user-facing command interface output is the highest authority. That claim fails the diagnose the hidden failure evidence boundary for Python314 Argparse.

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Python314 Argparse
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Python314 Argparse: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Bookbot team handles case 5563 during an assistive-technology terminal review. Build deterministic Python evidence to define and validate a reproducible task-oriented argparse interface with useful help; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of host file, process, Git, package-install, credential, and release effects; then move the input through a symlink outside the allowed root and reject it without reading content. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Python314 Argparse.
steps.why: Retrieving Python314 Argparse through the concrete testable user-facing command interface case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Python314 Argparse, keep Python314 Argparse connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.

Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.

For Bookbot and Python Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Python314 Argparse, challenge the documented misconception with changed-file, changed-encoding, Unicode, token, ranking, stream, CLI, test, package, security, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: Argparse output and defaults never change between Python versions.
